mission.title: traefik: Local private plugins.
mission.description:
### What does this PR do?

Adds support for local private plugins.

The plugins must be placed in `./plugins-local` directory, ex:
```
./plugins-local/
└── src
    └── github.com
        └── traefik
            └── plugindemo
                ├── demo.go
                ├── demo_test.go
                ├── go.mod
                ├── LICENSE
                ├── Makefile
                └── readme.md
```

### Motivation

### More

- ~~[ ] Added/updated documentation~~

### Additional Notes

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
./plugins-local/
└── src
    └── github.com
        └── traefik
            └── plugindemo
                ├── demo.go
                ├── demo_test.go
                ├── go.mod
                ├── LICENSE
                ├── Makefile
                └── readme.md
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/traefik/plugindemo/pull/13. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
Update documentation to be up to date with https://github.com/traefik/traefik/pull/8224

Co-authored-by: Tom Moulard <tom.moulard@traefik.io>
Co-authored-by: Romain <rtribotte@users.noreply.github.com>
codeSnippets:
./plugins-local/
└── src
    └── github.com
        └── traefik
            └── plugindemo
                ├── demo.go
                ├── demo_test.go
                ├── go.mod
                ├── LICENSE
                ├── Makefile
                └── readme.md

./plugins-local/
└── src
    └── github.com
        └── traefik
            └── plugindemo
                ├── demo.go
                ├── demo_test.go
                ├── go.mod
                ├── LICENSE
                ├── Makefile
                └── readme.md

entryPoints:
  web:
    address: :8081

api:
  insecure: true

log:
  level: DEBUG

providers:
  file:
    filename: ./dyn.yml
    watch: true

experimental:
#  plugins:
#    example1:
#      moduleName: github.com/traefik/plugindemo
#      version: v0.2.1

  localPlugins:
    example:
      moduleName: github.com/traefik/plugindemo

http:
  routers:
    my-router:
      rule: host(`demo.localhost`)
      service: service-foo
      entryPoints:
        - web
      middlewares:
        - my-plugin

  services:
    service-foo:
      loadBalancer:
        servers:
          - url: http://127.0.0.1:5000

  middlewares:
    my-plugin:
      plugin:
        example:
          headers:
            Foo: Bar

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible.
